name: Social Distiller
description: Turn a source artifact, curriculum topic, dissertation, newsletter, or live lesson into useful public X posts/replies by distilling the lesson, researching live chatter, queueing candidates, and optionally posting through the canonical x skill.
author: home23
triggers: find a tweet to respond to from this article
turn this newsletter into x posts
make this curriculum topic useful on x
compositionHints: Use distill first to create public lesson cards from internal artifacts.
Use research to find live X conversations before deciding reply vs standalone post.
Use queue for a full repeatable workflow: source -> lesson -> X chatter -> candidates -> recommendation.
Use post only with confirm:true; it delegates writes to the canonical x skill and verifies by reading the posted tweet.
For generated-image posts, generate the image first, then post with generatedImage:'latest', requireMedia:true, requireGeneratedImage:true.
